hackathon: Agents Assemble - The Healthcare AI Endgame | $25,000 | Mar 04 - May 11, 2026
description: MediChain is an autonomous healthcare agent framework that enables AI agents to query and process sensitive medical data while preserving patient privacy via Zero-Knowledge Proofs. Unlike existing compliance tools that verify regulatory adherence, MediChain verifies data minimization at the execution layer. The system uses a Node.js agent that interacts with a mock FHIR API, generating ZK proofs (circom) that confirm the agent only accessed fields relevant to a specific diagnosis (e.g., 'blood p
angle: First implementation of ZK-Proof of Data Minimization for autonomous agents, proving only necessary data fields were accessed without revealing raw patient records.
